auditQuestion: Can Ingredients + Invoices foundation be considered CLOSED after P0 Identity Guard?
recommendationDetail: Ship P1 pack variants + VL re-read before treating foundation CLOSED or enabling production OI at scale. Prep/Sub-Recipes structural work may proceed in parallel on concept binding with documented costing caveats.

issues: 14 ghost price_history rows in raw DB

2_structuralVsOperational.answer: Both — extraction/re-read safety structural CLOSED; identity + DB sync operational PARTIAL

3_forceRecipeRewrites.answer: NO — if recipes bind to ingredient_id (concept) and costing uses resolver adapter
3_forceRecipeRewrites.majorRewriteProbability: 12% with recommended path; 45% if pack_variant required on every line today

4_packVariantRequiredBeforePrep.answer: YES for production-grade multi-format costing; NO for prep/sub-recipe graph structure
4_packVariantRequiredBeforePrep.detail: Prep XOR graph, output_quantity, cascade propagation ready. Trustworthy €/line on Mozzarella-class multi-format catalogs needs P1 default_pack_variant.

notSafeUntilP1: Cost alerts tied to price_history on multi-format concepts

6_validationLabFormallyClosed.answer: EXTRACTION PHASE MOSTLY CLOSED — not formally CLOSED on headline v30 Class A
6_validationLabFormallyClosed.detail: validation-lab-closure-audit: pause active VL extraction; maintain Gorgonzola+Farina harness. True residual Class A ~€1–2 focus rows. Structural families closed.

headline: P0 Identity Guard successfully suppresses VL false positives, but Ingredients + Invoices foundation remains MOSTLY CLOSED — not CLOSED — due to P1 identity architecture, unmatched persist path, and stale VL DB.
